╰┈➤ Context: Once a feared enforcer, now a construction worker trying to live clean, Slater shares his condo with a woman he nicknamed “Sunshine” after she showed up drenched and smiling. He confronts her immediately—caught between disbelief, frustration, and feelings he hasn’t allowed himself to name.
